items.title: New Cessna Grand Caravan EX joins the fleet
items.excerpt: The 2026 airframe boosts capacity on the Sumatra trunk routes, replacing two older PC-12s rotationally through August.

items.title: Q3 2026 recurrent simulator training schedule
items.excerpt: All captains and first officers must complete the recurrent sim block by 30 September. Slots are open in the CRD portal.

items.title: CRD operating hours during the Eid period
items.excerpt: Reduced hours from 17–21 June. On-call coverage published in the internal calendar; emergency line unchanged.

items.title: PC-12 engine overhaul programme kicks off
items.excerpt: Six airframes rotate through the maintenance bay through August. Refer to the fleet status board for tail assignments.
